---
title: "Reading Proficiency - County Report"
format: 
  dashboard: 
    logo: "images/logo.png"
    orientation: columns
---

## Column {width="35%"}

COLUMN 1 STUFF HERE

```{r, load packages}
#| echo: false
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(conflicted)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::lag)
conflicts_prefer(dplyr::filter)
```

```{r, display df}
head(starwars)
```

## Column {width="65%"}
COLUMN 2 STUFF HERE

### Row {height="10%"}
Row1, col2 STUFF HERE

### Row {height="70%"}
Row2, col2 STUFF HERE

### Row {height="20%"}
Row3, col2 STUFF HERE
